exercises.title: Basic Noise Channel Library
exercises.description: Build a library of fundamental quantum noise channels.
tasks: Implement depolarizing channel with Kraus operators
Implement amplitude damping from T1 parameter
Implement phase damping from T2 and T1
Combine T1/T2 into unified decoherence model
Verify trace preservation and complete positivity
hints: Check Σₖ Kₖ†Kₖ = I for trace preservation
Apply to |+⟩ state to verify coherence decay

exercises.title: Circuit-Level Noise Simulator
exercises.description: Create a complete circuit noise simulator.
tasks: Apply different noise after 1Q and 2Q gates
Model idle noise during gate execution
Include SPAM (state prep and measurement) errors
Support multi-qubit systems
Track fidelity throughout circuit execution
exercises.expectedOutput: Working circuit simulator with realistic noise
hints: 2Q gates typically have 10× higher error than 1Q
All qubits decohere during each gate
Use tensor products to embed single-qubit noise
Test on Bell state preparation circuit

exercises.title: Technology Noise Model Comparator
exercises.description: Compare noise models for different qubit technologies.
tasks: Implement superconducting qubit noise model
Implement trapped ion noise model
Implement neutral atom noise model
Compare circuit fidelity for same algorithm
Identify optimal technology for different circuit depths
hints: Break-even depth depends on gate time / coherence time
Consider both gate errors and decoherence

exercises.title: Correlated Noise Analyzer
exercises.description: Model and analyze correlated noise effects on QEC.
tasks: Implement spatially correlated dephasing
Model ZZ crosstalk between neighboring qubits
Simulate correlated noise on a 3-qubit code
Compare logical error rates: correlated vs independent
Determine correlation strength where QEC fails
exercises.expectedOutput: Correlated noise impact analysis for QEC
hints: Use correlation matrix for spatial correlations
Correlated errors can exceed code distance
3-qubit code can correct 1 error, fails on 2+
